LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PACIFIC INSTITUTE, AGESONG, INC. AND NADER SHABAHANGI'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN A "SUBSTANTIAL RELATIONSHIP" BETWEEN THE SUBJECTS OF THE FORMER AND CURRENT REPRESENTATION. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATIONS OF ALI KIA SHABAHANGI AND MARTIN ZURADA IN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO DISQUALIFY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS OVERRULED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Disqualify Pltf'S Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARTIN ZURADA OF VENARDI/ZURADA LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 937-3903 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. GAY CROSTHWAIT GRUNFELD OF ROSEN BIEN & GRUNFELD LLP, TEL. NO. 433-6830 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PACIFIC INSTITUTE, AGESONG, INC. and NADER SHABAHANGI's Motion To Disqualify Plaintiff's Counsel is denied. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. Defendant has not shown a "substantial relationship" between the subjects of the former and current representation. Defendant's objections to the Declarations of Ali Kia Shabahangi and Martin Zurada in Opposition to Defendants' Motion to disqualify Plaintiff's counsel is overruled. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
